case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MIMS, ERNEST

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,982.79 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MIMS, ERNEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIMS, ERNEST
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-12-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD WITH CASE #789248.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIMS, ERNEST $2,584.14 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.14, PLTF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO $2584.14 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
